description_long: This house features a modern A-frame architectural style with a steeply pitched roof and extensive use of wood and glass. The front facade is dominated by large floor-to-ceiling windows and sliding glass doors, opening onto a spacious wooden deck. The structure includes a single-story main living area and an attached carport with a flat roof, supported by slender columns. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks, while the roof is finished in a dark, matte material. The rear and side elevations are more solid, with minimal window openings and a strong geometric profile. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection to the outdoors.
description: A modern A-frame house with large glass windows, wooden cladding, and an attached flat-roofed carport. The design features a spacious deck and a striking geometric roofline.
description_view_0: The front view showcases the A-frame roof, expansive glass facade, and wooden deck, with the carport visible to the right.
description_view_1: The top-down view highlights the contrasting roof shapes and the layout of the deck and carport.
description_view_2: The side view reveals the solid wooden wall of the A-frame section and the open structure of the carport.
description_view_3: The rear view shows the plain back of the house with minimal openings and the full extent of the roof surfaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows on front, minimal windows on sides and rear
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a glass door integrated into the front window wall, opening onto a wide wooden deck with no steps or porch overhang.
